hero.title: YOUR DIGITAL WALLET FOR COUPONS
hero.subtitle: Multi-platform coupon collection experience improving redemption rates 40%+. Cross-device sync and smart organization powered by the Mezzofy Exchange Protocol, available as white-label or API integration.

platforms.title: Available Everywhere You Need It
platforms.subtitle: Choose the platform that works best for your customers. Mezzofy Coupon Wallet is accessible across all major platforms and devices.

ios.title: iOS Mobile App
ios.description: Native iPhone and iPad experience with seamless Apple Wallet integration and NFC tag support for instant coupon downloads

android.title: Android Mobile App
android.description: Optimized Android experience with Google Pay integration and NFC capabilities for tap-to-download coupons

web.title: Web Application
web.description: Access your wallet from any browser, any device. No app installation required for your customers

nfcCard.title: NFC Physical Card
nfcCard.description: Physical card with QR code and NFC chip for customers who prefer tangible wallet solutions

organization.title: Smart Organization
organization.item3: Coupon History - Access expired, voided, or transferred coupons

integration.title: Flexible Integration
integration.item5: SDK available for iOS and Android

step1.title: Choose Platform
step1.description: Select from iOS app, Android app, web application, or NFC physical card based on your customer preferences

step2.title: Retrieve Coupons
step2.description: Instantly access all stored coupons from the Mezzofy platform with automatic synchronization

step3.title: Manage & Redeem
step3.description: Filter coupons by status (Active, Redeemed, History), organize, and redeem with a simple tap

integrationOptions.title: Integration That Works Your Way
integrationOptions.subtitle: Whether you need a fully branded solution or want to integrate wallet functionality into your existing apps, we have you covered

whiteLabelSolution.title: White-Label Solution
whiteLabelSolution.description: Launch your own branded coupon wallet with complete design control and customization
whiteLabelSolution.feature1: Fully branded with your logo and colors
whiteLabelSolution.feature2: Custom domain and app store presence

apiIntegration.title: API Integration
apiIntegration.description: Seamlessly integrate wallet functionality into your existing mobile or web applications
apiIntegration.feature4: SDK available for iOS and Android

nfcFeature.title: NFC Tap-to-Download
nfcFeature.description: Mobile app users can interact with Mezzofy NFC tags to instantly download coupons with a simple tap. No manual input required - just tap your phone to the NFC tag and coupons are added to your wallet automatically.

ecosystem.title: Works Seamlessly with the Mezzofy Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: Coupon Wallet integrates with other Mezzofy products to create a complete solution

marketing.description: Purchased vouchers automatically added to wallet

marketplace.description: Access marketplace inventory from wallet interface

bundle.title: Recommended Bundle: Retail Excellence Bundle
bundle.description: Essential customer experience layer for any coupon distribution strategy

footerCta.title: Ready to Launch Your Digital Wallet?
footerCta.subtitle: Join leading brands and provide your customers with a seamless coupon wallet experience
